column1: # Publishes the species_X_all_annotations deliverables: the per-species proteome
# annotation tables (one row per protein, every per-gene feature joined), the
# per-structure variants with OCL columns, the coverage summary, and the
# validation report. Source globs are relative to this manifest's directory
# Build with (from the integrator subproject root):
# The publisher creates SYMLINKS (follow-the-symlink at HTTP request time, §38),
# so the large per-protein tables cost no extra disk to publish.
# This is a COPYME template (single source of truth). The discovery helper
# ignores manifests in workflow-COPYME-* dirs; copy this file into the canonical
# workflow-RUN_* dir for it to publish (per gigantic_conventions §38/§39).
# ----- Headline deliverable: per-species proteome annotation tables (invariant) -----

column6: One row per protein in each species proteome, with every structure-invariant per-gene feature joined: gene/CDS/protein sizes, hotspot membership, top-3 NCBI nr DIAMOND hits, Pfam / InterPro-GO / PANTHER-GO / PANTHER, pfam/go/panther annogroup membership, orthogroup identifier and size, secretome SignalP call and DeepLoc localization, trees_gene_groups and trees_gene_families AGS membership, and dark-proteome status. One file per species. Coverage differs by source (NA plus an availability flag where a source does not cover a species or protein).

column1: # ----- Per-structure variants: base columns plus species-tree-structure OCL -----

column4: Per-species proteome annotation table with per-structure OCL
column6: The per-species base table PLUS the orthogroup and pfam-annogroup Origin-Conservation-Loss (OCL) columns for one species-tree structure: per-protein origin phylogenetic block, block-state, and path, and conservation, loss, and continued-absence event counts. One file per species per structure, organized into per-structure subdirectories (structure_NNN).

One row per species: protein count and per-axis availability flags (gene_sizes, hotspots, nr hits, annotations_hmms, secretome, dark proteome). Documents where each source covers the 70-species set (gene_sizes/hotspots = 64/70).

Fail-fast validation cross-checks (base-table headers, Sequence_Identifier uniqueness and species containment, availability-flag/NA consistency, per-structure row counts, and orthogroup-OCL referential integrity). Status PASS means every cross-check held.
